localized_texts.text: Entopia

Imagine nature’s largest classroom and discovery hub, where butterflies and insects are free to come out and play. Within Entopia lies two worlds; The Natureland living outdoor gardens and The Cocoon indoor discovery centre. Over 150 species of fauna and more than 200 species of flora are being showcased throughout Entopia’s entire exhibition. Entopia is a nature discovery and exploration center located in Teluk Bahang, Penang, Malaysia. The center is dedicated to promoting awareness and appreciation of the natural world, particularly the insects and other invertebrates that play important roles in maintaining ecological balance.Entopia is housed in a large greenhouse-like structure that spans more than 100,000 square feet. Within the center, visitors can explore a variety of exhibits and displays, including live insect displays, interactive educational exhibits, and immersive habitats that simulate different ecosystems and natural environments.One of the center's main attractions is its butterfly sanctuary, which is home to over 15,000 free-flying butterflies from more than 200 species. Visitors can stroll through the sanctuary and observe the butterflies as they flit among the flowers and foliage, or even participate in guided tours and hands-on activities.In addition to its butterfly sanctuary, Entopia also features a variety of other exhibits and attractions, including a bug exploration zone, a learning lab, a Thai water garden, and more. The center is open year-round and is a popular destination for families, nature enthusiasts, and anyone interested in learning more about the amazing diversity and beauty of the natural world.
Natureland: This living garden vivarium is a shared ecological space for a variety of animals from invertebrates and reptiles living in their re-created natural
It is one of the largest butterfly gardens in Malaysia with approximately 15,000 free-flying butterflies at any one time consisting of up to 60 species.
The living garden features more than 200 species of plants with waterfalls, ponds, caves, and other artistic garden features.
The Cocoon: This indoor discovery center is designed to let visitors self-explore the world of invertebrates through various interactive edu-stations.
Some of its exciting attractions include the Pandora Forest, Metamorphosis, Lumino City, Downtown Entopia, Breeding Ground, Underground Mysteries, etcs.
Nature Learning Activities:
- The Natureland: The Natureland, which is a living garden vivarium, is a shared ecological space for a variety of animals from invertebrates and reptiles living in their re-created natural habitat.
- The Cocoon: The Cocoon features two floors of learning exhibitions and indoor activities.
- Nature Talk: Join the Nature Activity Team as they share their passion for nature with you!

- Vita Nova: How do we do it? By releasing newly-emerged butterflies, witnessing their very first flight and watching them dance gracefully in our enchanting aviary. This one-of-a-kind experience will guarantee to be the highlight of your day!
- Bug Exploration: Explore with us as we discover the interesting lives of our amazing animal friends and catch glimpses of our Bug Exploration superstars.
- Special Appearance: You might grab a chance to meet our superstars! Come and capture your magical moments with them.

- Butterfly Race: Discover mother nature by challenging yourself to complete the race. You’ll be seeking out the different butterflies here in the garden and also stand a chance to win yourself a limited edition gift!
Operation Hours: Please kindly visit Entopia official website for any updates of operation hours.
Accessibility: Wheelchair accessible.
Butterflies are not visible or active at night, as they rest after sunset. Entopia By Night focuses on biofluorescence and nocturnal discoveries.
Entopia By Night is exclusively an outdoor garden experience. Indoor Discovery Centre (Cocoon) and Entopia Store will remain closed from 6:00pm onwards.
Visitors are advised to check the weather forecast before purchasing tickets and bring umbrellas to enjoy the garden walk comfortably in case of rain.
How to use: Show Mobile Ticket: Please proceed directly to the entrance turnstile to scan your e-ticket. There is no need to queue at the ticketing counter.
How to use: Entopia is open daily from 9:00am to 6:00pm. Last admission is at 5:00pm. Please check our official website at www.entopia.com for the latest updates or announcements.
How to use: Proof of age will be required when redeeming entries for children and senior citizens at the admission turnstiles.
How to use: Tickets are valid for one-time entry only. No re-entry. No refunds or cancellations. For more information, visit https://www.entopia.com/faq/

Terms & Conditions: Tickets are rain and shine. No refund will be given due to inclement weather. Tickets are not for resale and not exchangeable for cash. Expired e-ticket(s) will not be acknowledge, extended, replaced or refunded. Butterfly House (Pg) Sdn. Bhd. may, without prior notice and without refund or compensation, change its operating hours due to inclement weather, special events, safety or security concerns. Butterfly House (Pg) Sdn. Bhd. reserves the right to amend or supplement these Terms and Conditions at any time without any prior notice. In the event of disputes regarding these Terms and Conditions, the decision of Butterfly House (Pg) Sdn. Bhd. shall be final. Please visit our website at www.entopia.com for latest announcement or updates. For enquiries, please email to sales@entopia.com
Cancellation Policy: No cancellation for this activity as per vendor policy
